messages.content:
Okay, let's check the status of your order. To do that, I'll need you to provide a few key details:

1. Your full name
2. The last 4 digits of your social security number
3. Your date of birth (in YYYY-MM-DD format)

Once I have those three pieces of information, I can look up the status of your order. Please provide those details, and I'll be happy to assist you further.

Thank you for providing your name 'LA'. To check the status of your order, I'll also need the last 4 digits of your social security number and your date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format. Once you have that information ready, please provide it and I'll be happy to look up the status of your order.

Thank you for providing the last 4 digits of your social security number. To check the status of your order, I still need your date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format. Once you have that information ready, please provide it and I'll be happy to look up the status of your order.

Okay, I've looked up the status of your order using the information you provided. Your order has been shipped and the estimated delivery date is April 20, 2026.

Please let me know if you need any other assistance with your order or have any other questions I can help with.
